title: Row value comparison malfunctions with rtree table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE rt1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM rt1, t1 WHERE (t1.c0, t1.c1) > (rt1.c2, 'value');
key_bug_features: Row value comparison with NULL in rtree table
